calendar.matters:
Petition For Order Modifying Trust And Authorizing Execution For General Release Agreement.
Off Calendar Jan-22-2010 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Ellen Kahn for Petra Michel (Petitioner).

Ms. Kahn stated that San Francisco was the proper venue for the Trust, that she drafted the trust, that it was designed to hold the term life insurance policy on the Trustor and that the idea to have a professional Trustee was presented by U.S. Trust. In addition, she stated that the Trustor thought it would be simpler for a corporation to handle the annual obligations and that he did not want to burden his Friends. Furthermore, he stated that U.S. Trust imploded, that the Wife went to Lehman who also imploded, that they felt that having an Individual who could select any investment would be the right choice and that it may not be appropriate to have Mr. Unger as the Trustee as he was the named Guardian Ad Litem for the Children. The matter was taken under submission.

Judge Pro Temp: Sue M. Kaplan. Reporter: Diana Chen, CSR#11312. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy J. Capozzoli.
